How to Play
Drop tiles.
Clear rows.
Beat the frog.
Drag pieces onto the board and fill complete rows or columns to clear them. Fill up without clearing and it's game over. Simple idea — brutal in practice.
Solo Play
Four ways
to play.
Start free with Tadpole. Unlock faster, wilder modes as you go.
🥚

Classic — clear rows, beat your score.

The Frogs
They're not
on your side.
Two frogs show up uninvited during every game. You can't stop them — only survive them.
Red Frog
Drops extra tiles on your board. Gets more aggressive the better you play — consider it a compliment.
Purple Frog
Clears tiles when you're really struggling. A small mercy — don't count on it showing up.
Toggle both frogs and their commentary in ⚙ Settings.
Magic Powers
Your secret
weapons.
Choose SPARK, SURGE or STORM — annual subscriptions from £0.99/yr. Each power clears your fullest rows and auto-refills every 30 seconds. One free use resets daily.
